title: UpdateShippingOption

lineItemId.description:
A unique eBay-assigned ID value that identifies the line item in a checkout session.

For example: v1|2**********6|5**********4 or v1|1**********9|0.

For more information about item IDs for RESTful APIs, see Legacy API compatibility

shippingOptionId.description: A unique identifier of the selected shipping option/method.

description: A type that defines the fields used to update the shipping option of a line item.
